hudson.tasks.Shell.command:
# first run: May 21, 2026 # DwCA renamed from: 10088_6943_ENV to: SIcontrib2Botany # just to have a more telling name.
cd /var/www/html/eol_php8_code/update_resources/connectors ### OK 0of4: This will add a 'genus' column in taxa extension. This is an adjustment for SIcontrib2Botany.tar.gz ### source is: SIcontrib2Botany.tar.gz ### generates: SIcontrib2Botany_taxaFixed.tar.gz php dwca_update_taxa.php _ '{"source_dwca": "SIcontrib2Botany", "resource_id":"SIcontrib2Botany_taxaFixed", "resource":"update_taxa"}'
### OK 1of4: This will add higherClassification in taxon.tab and rebuild the DwCA. With carry-over of other extensions. ### source is: MoftheAES_resources_taxaFixed.tar.gz ### generates FILENAME-with-hC.tar.gz php dwca_utility.php _ '{"resource_id": "SIcontrib2Botany_taxaFixed", "task": "gen_hC_using_ancestry"}' #using kingdom, phylum, class, order, family, genus
### OK 2of4: This use gnparser one name at a time. Not entire file. php run_gnparser_dwca.php _ '{"resource_id": "SIcontrib2Botany_taxaFixed-with-hC"}' #OK gen neo4j_1
### OK 3of4: Start matching taxa php match_taxa_2DH.php _ '{"resource_id": "SIcontrib2Botany_taxaFixed-with-hC_neo4j_1", "AncestryIndexVer": "new"}' #OK gen +_eolID
### OK 4of4: Convert taxon.tab, use EOLid value for taxonID. ### REMINDER: Multiple scinames with different taxonIDs have the same canonical thus will have the same EOLid php use_EOLid_as_taxonID.php _ '{"resource_id": "SIcontrib2Botany_taxaFixed-with-hC_neo4j_1_eolID"}' # gen SIcontrib2Botany_taxaFixed_finale
php analyze_MoF.php _ '{"resource_id": "SIcontrib2Botany_taxaFixed_finale"}'
### rename cd /var/www/html/eol_php8_code/applications/content_server/resources_3 cp SIcontrib2Botany_taxaFixed_finale.tar.gz SIcontrib2Botany_TraitBank_1_0.tar.gz ls -lt SIcontrib2Botany_taxaFixed_finale.tar.gz ls -lt SIcontrib2Botany_TraitBank_1_0.tar.gz rm -f SIcontrib2Botany_taxaFixed_finale.tar.gz
